basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Research Associate-1 Notification 2026 has been released on July 2026 on the official website https://home.iitd.ac.in/. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Delhi Research Associate-1 Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Mechanical/Aerospace Engineering with background in fluid dynamics and compressible flows, 1st class M.Tech in Mechanical/Aerospace Engineering with background in compressible flows with minimum 3 years of experience in aerospace industry
qualification.details: Ph.D. in Mechanical/Aerospace Engineering with background in fluid dynamics and compressible flows. Experience with experimental setups dealing with high-pressures is a bonus. Must be able to demonstrate mathematical maturity and application in engineering problems OR 1st class M.Tech in Mechanical/Aerospace Engineering with background in compressible flows with minimum 3 years of experience in aerospace industry. Experience with high-pressure air flow setups is a bonus.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Research Associate-1 Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Delhi Research Associate-1 Job 2026 Notification PDF

IIT Delhi Research Associate-1 Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Ph.D. in Mechanical/Aerospace Engineering with background in fluid dynamics and compressible flows. Experience with experimental setups dealing with high-pressures is a bonus. Must be able to demonstrate mathematical maturity and application in engineering problems OR 1st class M.Tech in Mechanical/Aerospace Engineering with background in compressible flows with minimum 3 years of experience in aerospace industry. Experience with high-pressure air flow setups is a bonus.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Research Associate-1 Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Research Associate-1 Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Research Associate-1 Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Research Associate-1 position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Associate-1 position at IIT Delhi is 29th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate-1 post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Ph.D. in Mechanical/Aerospace Engineering with a background in fluid dynamics and compressible flows, or a 1st class M.Tech in Mechanical/Aerospace Engineering with a background in compressible flows and at least 3 years of experience in the aerospace industry.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate-1 position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Associate-1 position at IIT Delhi.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate-1 role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 58,000/- per month plus HRA at 27%.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply by sending their complete application via email before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Associate-1 position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job position.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the IIT Delhi located?
faq.answer: IIT Delhi is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110016.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the provided link in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
